segments.text: Blessed be the LORD my rock, who trains my hands for war, and my fingers for battle
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: to war…: Heb. to the war, etc

segments.text: My goodness and my fortress, my stronghold and my deliverer, my shield and he in whom I take refuge, who subdues my people under me
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O LORD, what is man that you regard him, or the son of man that you think of him?
Man is like a breath; his days are like a passing shadow
Bow your heavens, O LORD, and come down! Touch the mountains so that they smoke!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Make lightning flash and scatter them; send out your arrows and rout them
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Stretch out your hand from on high; rescue me and deliver me from the many waters, from the hand of foreigners
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Whose mouths speak lies, and whose right hand is a right hand of falsehood
I will sing a new song to you, O God; upon a ten-stringed harp I will play to you
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Who gives victory to kings, who rescues David his servant from the cruel sword
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Rescue me and deliver me from the hand of foreigners, whose mouths speak lies, and whose right hand is a right hand of falsehood
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May our sons be like plants full grown, our daughters like corner pillars cut for the structure of a palace
May our granaries be full, providing all kinds of produce; may our sheep bring forth thousands and ten thousands in our fields

footnotes: all…: Heb. from kind to kind

segments.text: May our oxen be well laden, with no breach or loss, and no outcry in our streets

footnotes: strong…: Heb. able to bear burdens, or, loaden with flesh

segments.text: Blessed are the people to whom such blessings fall! Blessed are the people whose God is the LORD!
